mapper.select: /** UsptCnvnApplcntHistDao.selectMaxHist */ select a.* from ( select cnvn_applcnt_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_cnvn_applcnt_hist_id ,applcnt_nm ,gender_cd ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_brthdy ,native ,enc_email ,indvdl_bsnm_div_cd ,charger_nm ,ceo_nm ,bizrno ,charger_mbtlnum ,charger_email ,row_number() over (order by created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_cnvn_applcnt_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_cnvn_applcnt_hist_id is null or confm_cnvn_applcnt_hist_id = '') ) a where a.rn = 1

/** UsptCnvnApplcntHistDao.selectUsptCnvnApplcntHistChangeDe */ select cnvn_change_req_id , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmdd') as change_de , to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') as change_dt from uspt_cnvn_applcnt_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_cnvn_applcnt_hist_id is null or confm_cnvn_applcnt_hist_id ='') /*변경전정보는 제외*/ order by created_dt desc

/** UsptCnvnApplcntHistDao.selectUsptCnvnApplcntHistByDt */ select 'before' as change_be_af , cnvn_applcnt_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_cnvn_applcnt_hist_id ,applcnt_nm ,gender_cd ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_brthdy ,native ,enc_email ,indvdl_bsnm_div_cd ,charger_nm ,ceo_nm ,bizrno ,charger_mbtlnum ,charger_email ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_cnvn_applcnt_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and confm_cnvn_applcnt_hist_id is not null and confm_cnvn_applcnt_hist_id !='' union all select 'after' as change_be_af , cnvn_applcnt_hist_id ,cnvn_change_req_id ,confm_cnvn_applcnt_hist_id ,applcnt_nm ,gender_cd ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_brthdy ,native ,enc_email ,indvdl_bsnm_div_cd ,charger_nm ,ceo_nm ,bizrno ,charger_mbtlnum ,charger_email ,to_char(created_dt,'yyyy-mm-dd') as change_de from uspt_cnvn_applcnt_hist where cnvn_change_req_id = #{cnvnChangeReqId} and ( confm_cnvn_applcnt_hist_id is null or confm_cnvn_applcnt_hist_id = '') and to_char(created_dt,'yyyymmddhh24miss') = #{changeDt}
